name: Iso11783OPConnectEnvVar
title: Iso11783OPConnectEnvVar
syntax: long Iso11783OPConnectEnvVar( dword ecuHandle, char envVarName[], dword objectId );
description: Connects an object (variable, value or string) from the object pool to an environment variable.

If an object is changed, the new value is put the environment variable. And vice versa, if the value of an environment variable is changed, the new value is also written to the connected object. Additionally a Change String or Change Numeric Value command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU. The handle must be created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Identifier of the object in the object pool

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
